message:
The other day, I was out with my dog, Max, when my phone decided it was the perfect moment to die. I was trying to take a cute picture of him chasing a squirrel, but instead, I was left with a blank screen and a very energetic pup. 

I had to rely on my memory for that adorable moment, and it made me realize how often we depend on our gadgets for everything. Whether it’s snapping a photo or keeping track of emergency contacts, it’s easy to forget that sometimes, tech can fail us at the least convenient times! 

That little hiccup reminded me of the importance of having a plan that doesn’t rely solely on my phone. It’s always good to have a backup, right? This little refresher helped me think through some essentials! 

What’s your go-to backup plan when tech lets you down?
